vocab.meaning: tiếp thêm năng lượng, làm cho sảng khoái
vocab.example: I find a morning trek to be incredibly invigorating, providing me with a mental surge that lasts all day.

vocab.meaning: việc bị gò bó trong lối sống ít vận động
vocab.example: Walking is my primary escape from the sedentary confinement of modern office life.
I often hit the pavements in the late evening when the city heat has finally dissipated.

vocab.meaning: sức bền, khả năng chịu đựng
vocab.example: Frequent long-distance walking has significantly bolstered my physical stamina over the years.

vocab.meaning: có tính trị liệu, giúp giải tỏa tinh thần
vocab.example: There is something deeply therapeutic about walking in silence, far away from the cacophony of the city.

vocab.meaning: đi dạo nhẹ nhàng, không vội vã
vocab.example: I occasionally enjoy an aimless amble through the historic quarters to admire the local architecture.
I am quite meticulous about monitoring my daily step count to ensure I meet my fitness goals.
When I feel a creative block, I take a walk specifically for a change of scenery to stimulate new ideas.

vocab.meaning: các khu vực dành riêng cho người đi bộ
vocab.example: I tend to frequent pedestrianized zones where I can walk freely without the constant worry of traffic.
Walking on uneven trails during my weekend trips helps me maintain my balance and physical agility.
